debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
x y : α
h✝ : (x : α) → @Graph.inessential α β G x
h : G.Adj x y
⊢ Matroid.Series (@Graph.matchingMatroid α β G) x y

failed_attempts:
have hx := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_iness h.left_mem
  have hy := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_iness h.right_mem
  have hne : x ≠ y := h.ne
  refine (G.matchingMatroid.series_iff_cocircuit_of_ne hne).mpr ?_
  rw [cocircuit_iff_mem_min_basis_intersect]
  refine ⟨by simp, fun B hB ↦ ?_⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := hB
  have h_ne : (V(G, M) ∩ {x, y}).Nonempty := by
    by_contra' h_disj
    exact hM.not_max_of_adj h (h_disj x (by simp)) (h_disj y (by simp))
  refine ⟨h_ne, ?_⟩
  intro e he
  obtain ⟨Mx, hMx, hx'⟩ := h_iness x
  obtain ⟨My, hMy, hy'⟩ := h_iness y
  simp only [mem_insert_iff, mem_singleton_iff] at he
  rcases he with rfl | rfl
  · exact ⟨V(G, Mx), ⟨Mx, hMx, rfl⟩, by simp [hx', h_ne.not_disjoint_iff_exists_mem]⟩
  · exact ⟨V(G, My), ⟨My, hMy, rfl⟩, by simp [hy', h_ne.not_disjoint_iff_exists_mem]⟩

have hne : x ≠ y := h.ne
  have hx : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := G.matchingMatroid.noColoop (by assumption) h.v_mem_left
  have hy : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop y := G.matchingMatroid.noColoop (by assumption) h.v_mem_right
  refine' (G.matchingMatroid.series_iff_cocircuit hne).mpr ⟨hx, hy, fun B hB ↦ _⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hMB⟩ := G.matchingMatroid.isBasis_iff.mp hB
  by_contra! hxy
  exact hM.not_max_of_adj_not_mem h hxy.1 hxy.2

have hx := matchingMatroid.noColoop h h_adj.mem_ground_left
  have hy := matchingMatroid.noColoop h h_adj.mem_ground_right
  refine' (G.matchingMatroid.series_iff_cocircuit_of_not_coloop hx hy).mpr ⟨_, _⟩
  · rintro B ⟨M, hM, hB⟩
    by_contra h_disj
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj
    have hM' : G.IsMatching (insert e M) := by sorry
    exact hM.max (insert e M) hM' |>.not_lt (by sorry)
  · rintro S hS hS_sub
    sorry

apply Matroid.series_iff_forall_isBasis_not_subset (matchingMatroid.noColoop h h.ground_left) (matchingMatroid.noColoop h h.ground_right)
  intro B hB hB_sub
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hB_vM⟩ := hB.indep
  obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h
  have hP := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he (fun hx ↦ hB_sub (hB_vM hx)) (fun hy ↦ hB_sub (hB_vM hy)) h.ne
  have : M.encard < ν(G) := by rw [← hP.augment_encard]; exact hP.augment.encard_le
  refine this.not_le (by
    rw [← ENat.mul_le_mul_left (a := 2) (by simp), ← hB.encard]
    exact (encard_mono hB_vM).trans (by sorry))

let M := G.matchingMatroid
  have hx : M.dual.IsNonloop x := M.dual_isNonloop_iff.mpr (matchingMatroid.noColoop h_ine hadj.mem_ground_left)
  have hy : M.dual.IsNonloop y := M.dual_isNonloop_iff.mpr (matchingMatroid.noColoop h_ine hadj.mem_ground_right)
  apply series_iff_parallel.mpr
  obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hadj
  refine (M.dual.parallel_iff_circuit he.ne).mpr ⟨hx, hy, ?_, he.ne⟩
  rw [dual_indep_iff_exists_basis_disjoint]
  rintro ⟨B, hB, hdisj⟩
  obtain ⟨M', hM', hBM'⟩ := hB.indep
  have hxe : x ∉ V(G, M') := fun h ↦ (disjoint_left.mp hdisj) (mem_insert x _) (hBM' h)
  have hye : y ∉ V(G, M') := fun h ↦ (disjoint_left.mp hdisj) (mem_insert_of_mem (mem_singleton y)) (hBM' h)
  let P : WList α β := .cons x e (.nil y)
  have hP : G.IsAugPath hM' P := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he hxe hye he.ne
  have hI : M.Indep (insert x B) := ⟨M' ∆ E(P), hP.augment, insert_subset
    ⟨e, mem_symmDiff.mpr (Or.inr (by simp [P, WList.edge])), he.left_mem⟩
    (hBM'.trans hP.augment_vertex_subset)⟩
  exact hB.insert_not_indep (disjoint_left.mp hdisj (mem_insert x _)) hI
sorry

have hx := matchingMatroid.noColoop h h.left_mem
  have hy := matchingMatroid.noColoop h h.right_mem
  exact (Matroid.series_iff_cocircuit hx hy).mpr ⟨h.ne, h.cocircuit_of_adj⟩

obtain ⟨e, he, hxy, hne⟩ := hadj
  have h_basis : ∀ B, G.matchingMatroid.IsBasis B → ({x, y} ∩ B).Nonempty := by
    rintro B ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ hB
    exact (hM.max (M ∪ {e}) (hM.isMatching_union_edge_of_not_mem (by simpa [hxy] using hB))).not_lt (by simp [hM.subset he, he])
  have hx := hadj.mem_ground_left; have hy := hadj.mem_ground_right
  exact ⟨G.matchingMatroid.noColoop h hx, G.matchingMatroid.noColoop h hy,
    (Matroid.series_iff_mem_closure_dual hy hx).mpr (Matroid.mem_closure_dual_iff_forall_isBasis.mpr
    (fun B hB hxB ↦ by simpa [not_or_intro] using h_basis B hB))⟩

set M := G.matchingMatroid
  have hxy : x ≠ y := G.ne_of_adj hadj
  apply (Matroid.series_iff_cocircuit hxy).mpr
  apply Matroid.cocircuit_iff_minimal_inter_basis.mpr
  constructor
  · rintro B ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hadj
    by_contra h_disj
    have hP := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he (by simpa using h_disj) (by simpa using h_disj) hxy
    exact hM'.isBasis.not_ssubset ⟨M' ∆ E(P), hP.augment, rfl.subset⟩
      (hP.augment_vertex_subset.ssubset_iff_exists_not_mem.mpr ⟨x, by simpa using hP.nonempty, by simpa using h_disj⟩)
  · rintro s (rfl | rfl)
    · obtain ⟨M', hM', hxM'⟩ := h x; exact ⟨V(G, M'), hM'.isBasis, by simpa⟩
    · obtain ⟨M', hM', hyM'⟩ := h y; exact ⟨V(G, M'), hM'.isBasis, by simpa⟩

obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h
  rw [Matroid.series_iff_dual_parallel, Matroid.parallel_iff_isNonloop_isNonloop_indep_not]
  refine ⟨(noColoop h_iness he.left_mem).dual_isNonloop, (noColoop h_iness he.right_mem).dual_isNonloop, ?_⟩
  rintro ⟨B, hB, hxy⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hBM⟩ := G.matchingIndepMatroid.indep_iff.1 hB.indep
  have hMB : V(G, M) = B := hB.eq_of_subset_indep (G.matchingIndepMatroid.indep_iff.2 ⟨M, hM, Set.subset_refl _⟩) hBM
  have hP := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he (fun hx ↦ Set.disjoint_iff_forall_not_mem.1 hxy x (by simp) (hMB ▸ hx))
    (fun hy ↦ Set.disjoint_iff_forall_not_mem.1 hxy y (by simp) (hMB ▸ hy)) he.ne
  have h_ind : G.matchingMatroid.Indep V(G, M ∆ E(WList.cons x e (.nil y))) := ⟨_, hP.augment, Set.subset_refl _⟩
  apply h_ind.encard_le_eRank.not_lt
  rw [hB.encard_eq_eRank.symm, ← hMB]
  refine enat.encard_lt_encard (hP.augment_vertex_subset.ssubset_of_ne ?_)
  intro h_eq; exact hP.first_not_in (h_eq.symm ▸ ⟨e, by simp, by simp [he.V]⟩)

refine' (G.matchingMatroid.series_iff_cocircuit (noColoop h (by sorry)) 
    (noColoop h (by sorry))).mpr (fun B hB ↦ _)
  obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hadj
  by_contra! h_disj
  exact hB.not_isMaxMatching_of_exists_augPath (isAugPath_of_singleEdge he h_disj.1 h_disj.2 he.ne)

have hnc := G.matchingMatroid.noColoop h_iness
  apply Matroid.series_iff_dual_parallel.2
  refine ⟨hnc x, hnc y, le_antisymm ?_ ?_⟩
  all_goals
    rw [Matroid.closure_le_iff_subset_closure, singleton_subset_iff, Matroid.mem_closure_iff_forall_basis_not_mem_imp_mem]
    intro B hB hx; obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := hB
    by_contra hy; exact (hB.isMaxMatching hM).not_adj_not_mem (by assumption) hx hy

have hx := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_ine (G.mem_V_of_adj_left h)
  have hy := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_ine (G.mem_V_of_adj_right h)
  refine' (hx.series_iff_forall_basis_inter_nonempty hy).mpr (fun B hB ↦ _)
  obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := hB
  obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h
  rw [Set.not_disjoint_iff_nonempty_inter]
  by_contra' h_disj
  have hM' : G.IsMatching (M ∪ {e}) := by
    refine' ⟨Set.insert_subset he.mem_E hM.subset, fun f hf g hg hne ↦ _⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff] at hf hg
    obtain rfl | hf := hf <;> obtain rfl | hg := hg
    · contradiction
    · rw [he.V_eq]; exact h_disj.symm.mono_left (hM.subset_V_of_mem hg)
    · rw [he.V_eq]; exact h_disj.mono_right (hM.subset_V_of_mem hf)
    · exact hM.disjoint hf hg hne
  exact (hM.isMaxMatching_of_encard (IsMaxMatching.encard hM)).max (M ∪ {e}) hM' |>.not_lt 
    (by rw [encard_union_singleton (hM.not_mem_of_not_mem_V (h_disj.mono_right (Set.subset_insert _ _)))]; exact Order.lt_add_one _)

have hx := G.adj_v_of_adj h |>.1
  have hy := G.adj_v_of_adj h |>.2
  refine Matroid.Series.mk (matchingMatroid.noColoop h hx) (matchingMatroid.noColoop h hy) (fun B hB hxB ↦ ?_)
  by_contra hyB
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hBM⟩ := hB.indep
  obtain ⟨e, he, -⟩ := h
  let P := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he (fun h ↦ hxB (hBM h)) (fun h ↦ hyB (hBM h)) h.ne_of_loopless
  have h_ind := (matchingIndepMatroid G).indep_iff.mpr ⟨M ∆ E(P), P.augment, P.augment_vertex_subset.trans (by rfl)⟩
  have h_card := P.augment_encard
  rw [← hM.encard, ← ENat.add_one_le_iff (IsMatching.encard_le hM).ne_top] at h_card
  exact h_card.not_le (IsMatching.encard_le P.augment)

have hx := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_ine (G.v_mem_of_adj_left h_adj)
  have hy := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_ine (G.v_mem_of_adj_right h_adj)
  refine' ⟨hx, hy, fun B hB ↦ _⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := hB
  obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj
  by_contra! h'
  have hp := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he h'.1 h'.2 he.left_ne_right
  exact (hM.max _ hp.augment).not_lt (by rw [hp.augment_encard]; exact Order.lt_add_one _)

obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj
  apply series_iff_forall_isBasis_not_subset he.left_mem he.right_mem (noColoop h he.left_mem) (noColoop h he.right_mem) |>.mpr
  rintro B hB ⟨hx, hy⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hBM⟩ := hB
  have hP := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he (mt (@hBM x) hx) (mt (@hBM y) hy) he.ne
  have hM' := hP.augment
  have hMcd : M.encard = ν(G) := by
    refine le_antisymm hM.encard_le ?_
    rw [← ENat.mul_le_mul_left (a := 2) (by simp), ← hB.encard, matchingMatroid, IndepMatroid.matroid_eRank_eq]
    exact (encard_mono hBM).trans (hM.degree_le_one.encard_V_matching_le)
  exact hM'.encard_le.not_lt (by rw [hP.augment_encard, hMcd]; exact lt_add_one _)

obtain ⟨e, hl⟩ := hadj
  rw [Matroid.Series, Matroid.parallel_iff_circuit hadj.ne, Matroid.dual_circuit_iff_cocircuit]
  refine ⟨⟨{x, y}, fun B ⟨M, hM, hB⟩ ↦ by
    rw [not_disjoint_iff]; by_contra! hd
    have ha := isAugPath_of_singleEdge hl (hd x (by simp)) (hd y (by simp)) hadj.ne
    exact ha.augment_encard.symm.not_le (hM.max _ ha.augment)⟩, ?_⟩
  rintro s (rfl | rfl) <;> obtain ⟨M, hM, hMs⟩ := h _
  · exact ⟨V(G, M), ⟨hM.toIsMatching, rfl.subset⟩, fun S ⟨M', hM', hS⟩ hsub ↦
      hsub.antisymm (by simpa [hS, IsMaxMatching.encard hM] using hM'.encard_le)⟩ |>.basis_ground
  · exact ⟨V(G, M), ⟨hM.toIsMatching, rfl.subset⟩, fun S ⟨M', hM', hS⟩ hsub ↦
      hsub.antisymm (by simpa [hS, IsMaxMatching.encard hM] using hM'.encard_le)⟩ |>.basis_ground

obtain ⟨e, hl⟩ := hadj
  have h_not_coloop : ∀ v, ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop v := fun v ↦ matchingMatroid.noColoop h (v.inessential.inessential_of_not_mem.not_mem_ground.elim)
  sorry

have hne := h.ne
  rw [Matroid.series_iff_cocircuit hne]
  refine cocircuit_iff_minimal_inter_basis.mpr ⟨?_, ?_⟩
  · rintro B ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩
    by_contra! h_disj
    have hxy : x ∉ V(G, M) ∧ y ∉ V(G, M) := by
      simpa [disjoint_iff_inter_eq_empty] using h_disj
    exact (hM.max _ (isAugPath_of_singleEdge h hxy.1 hxy.2 hne).augment).not_lt (by sorry)
  · rintro S hS h_int
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hxM⟩ := h✝ x
    obtain ⟨M', hM', hyM'⟩ := h✝ y
    sorry

obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hadj
  have hx := matchingMatroid.noColoop h he.left_mem
  have hy := matchingMatroid.noColoop h he.right_mem
  refine' series_iff_forall_basis_inter_nonempty.mpr ⟨hx, hy, fun B hB ↦ ?_⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := hB
  by_contra! h_disj
  have hP := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he (not_mem_subset h_disj (by simp)) (not_mem_subset h_disj (by simp)) he.ne
  exact (withTop_add_one_gt M.encard).not_le (hM.max _ hP.augment ▸ hP.augment_encard.symm)

obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hadj
  apply (G.matchingMatroid.series_iff_isCocircuit he.ne).mpr
  apply Matroid.isCocircuit_iff_minimal_inter_basis.mpr
  constructor
  · rintro _ ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩; by_contra! hB
    have hP := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he hB.1 hB.2 he.ne
    exact (hM.max _ hP.augment).not_lt (by rw [hP.augment_encard]; exact ENat.lt_add_one (by sorry))
  · rintro S hS h_meets; obtain ⟨M, hM, hMx⟩ := h_iness x
    obtain ⟨z, hzS⟩ := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr (λ hE ↦ (h_meets _ ⟨_, hM, rfl⟩).ne_bot (by simp [hE]))
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hMz⟩ := h_iness z
    have := h_meets _ ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩
    obtain rfl | rfl := hS.subset hzS <;> (simpa [Set.insert_eq_of_mem, hS.2] using this)

refine Matroid.series_iff_cocircuit.mpr ⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · simp [h.ne]
  · rintro B ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩
    by_contra! hxy
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h
    let P := WList.cons x e (.nil y)
    have hP : G.IsAugPath hM.toIsMatching P := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he hxy.1 hxy.2 h.ne
    exact hP.augment_encard.symm.not_le (hM.max _ hP.augment)
  · rintro v (rfl | rfl) <;> exact matchingMatroid.noColoop h✝ (by simp)

have hx := matchingMatroid.noColoop ‹_› h.mem_ground
  have hy := matchingMatroid.noColoop ‹_› h.mem_ground_symm
  apply Matroid.series_iff_isCocircuit_of_not_coloop hx hy h.ne |>.mpr
  refine ⟨fun B hB ↦ ?_, fun s hs ↦ ?_⟩
  · obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := hB
    by_contra! hB'
    obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h
    have hP := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he (hB' x (by simp)) (hB' y (by simp)) h.ne
    exact (ENat.lt_add_one hM.encard_lt_top).not_le (hP.augment_encard ▸ hM.max _ hP.augment)
  · rintro s (rfl | rfl) <;> assumption

obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h_adj
  refine' Matroid.series_iff_cocircuit h_adj.ne |>.mpr ⟨fun B hB ↦ _, _⟩
  · obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := hB
    by_contra! hxy
    let P := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he hxy.1 hxy.2 h_adj.ne
    exact hM.max _ P.augment |>.not_lt P.augment_encard
  · rintro s (rfl | rfl) <;> obtain ⟨M, hM, hMs⟩ := h _ <;> exact ⟨V(G, M), hM.isBasis, hMs⟩

let M := G.matchingMatroid
  have hne : x ≠ y := h.ne
  rw [Matroid.series_iff_cocircuit hne]
  have h_inter (B : Set α) (hB : M.IsBasis B) : (B ∩ {x, y}).Nonempty := by
    obtain ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩ := hB; obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h
    by_contra! h_disj
    have h_match : G.IsMatching (insert e M') := {
      subset := insert_subset he.mem_edge hM'.subset
      disjoint := by
        intro f1 hf1 f2 hf2 hne_f; simp only [mem_insert_iff] at hf1 hf2
        obtain rfl | hf1 := hf1
        · obtain rfl | hf2 := hf2; contradiction
          rw [he.V_eq]; exact disjoint_iff_forall_ne.mpr (fun a ha b hb ↦ by
            obtain rfl | rfl := ha; all_goals { intro h_eq; subst h_eq; exact h_disj.le_bot ⟨⟨f2, hf2, hb⟩, by simp [h_eq]⟩ })
        · obtain rfl | hf2 := hf2
          · rw [he.V_eq]; exact disjoint_iff_forall_ne.mpr (fun a ha b hb ↦ by
            obtain rfl | rfl := hb; all_goals { intro h_eq; subst h_eq; exact h_disj.le_bot ⟨⟨f1, hf1, ha⟩, by simp [h_eq]⟩ })
          · exact hM'.disjoint hf1 hf2 hne_f }
    exact (encard_lt_encard_insert (fun heM' ↦ h_disj.le_bot ⟨⟨e, heM', by simp [he.V_eq]⟩, Or.inl rfl⟩)).not_le (hM'.max _ h_match)
  refine ⟨by simp [M, matchingIndepMatroid], h_inter, fun z hz ↦ ?_⟩
  obtain rfl | rfl := (by simpa using hz : z = x ∨ z = y)
  · obtain ⟨M', hM', hMy⟩ := h_ine y
    refine ⟨V(G, M'), hM', Set.ext fun a ↦ ?_⟩
    simp only [mem_inter_iff, mem_insert_iff, mem_singleton_iff]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨ha, rfl | rfl⟩; · rfl; · exact (hMy ha).elim
    · rintro rfl; obtain ⟨a', ha', rfl | rfl⟩ := h_inter _ hM'; · exact ⟨ha', Or.inl rfl⟩
      · exact (hMy ha').elim
  · obtain ⟨M', hM', hMx⟩ := h_ine x
    refine ⟨V(G, M'), hM', Set.ext fun a ↦ ?_⟩
    simp only [mem_inter_iff, mem_insert_iff, mem_singleton_iff]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨ha, rfl | rfl⟩; · exact (hMx ha).elim; · rfl
    · rintro rfl; obtain ⟨a', ha', rfl | rfl⟩ := h_inter _ hM'; · exact (hMx ha').elim
      · exact ⟨ha', Or.inr rfl⟩
sorry

set M := G.matchingMatroid
  have hx : ¬M.IsColoop x := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_iness (G.v_mem_v_of_adj hadj)
  have hy : ¬M.IsColoop y := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_iness (G.v_mem_v_of_adj hadj.symm)
  obtain rfl | hne := eq_or_ne x y; exact hx.series
  rw [Series, Matroid.parallel_iff_circuit, Matroid.circuit_iff_forall_isBasis]
  refine ⟨fun B hB ↦ ?_, fun z hz ↦ ?_⟩
  · obtain ⟨M', hM', rfl⟩ := hB; obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hadj; rintro ⟨hxe, hye⟩
    have hP := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he hxe hye hne
    exact (hP.augment_encard ▸ hM'.max _ hP.augment).not_lt (ENat.lt_add_one hM'.encard_le.ne_top)
  · obtain rfl | rfl := hz <;> [obtain ⟨M', hM', hV⟩ := h_iness y; obtain ⟨M', hM', hV⟩ := h_iness x]
    <;> exact ⟨V(G, M'), hM'.isBasis, by simpa using hV⟩

rw [Matroid.Series, Matroid.dual_parallel_iff_isCocircuit h.ne]
  refine Matroid.isCocircuit_iff_forall_isBasis.mpr ⟨fun B hB ↦ ?_, fun v hv ↦ ?_⟩
  · obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := hB
    by_contra! hxy
    obtain ⟨e, hl⟩ := h
    let P : WList α β := .cons x e (.nil y)
    have hM' : G.IsMaxMatching M := by
      obtain ⟨M', hM', hM'B⟩ := hB
      exact hM'.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset (by rw [← hM'B]; exact subset_V)
    have hP : G.IsAugPath hM.isMatching P := isAugPath_of_singleEdge hl hxy.1 hxy.2 h.ne
    exact hM'.encard.not_lt (hP.augment_encard.symm.trans_le (M ∆ P.edge).encard_le)
  · obtain rfl | rfl := hv
    · obtain ⟨M, hM, hx⟩ := h_iness y
      refine ⟨V(G, M), hM.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset (subset_V), ?_⟩
      have : x ∈ V(G, M) := by
        by_contra! hx_not
        obtain ⟨e, hl⟩ := h
        let P : WList α β := .cons y e (.nil x)
        have hP : G.IsAugPath hM.toIsMatching P := isAugPath_of_singleEdge hl hx hx_not h.ne.symm
        exact hM.encard.not_lt (hP.augment_encard.symm.trans_le (M ∆ P.edge).encard_le)
      simp [hx, this, Set.inter_singleton_iff]
    · obtain ⟨M, hM, hx⟩ := h_iness x
      refine ⟨V(G, M), hM.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset (subset_V), ?_⟩
      have : y ∈ V(G, M) := by
        by_contra! hy_not
        obtain ⟨e, hl⟩ := h
        let P : WList α β := .cons x e (.nil y)
        have hP : G.IsAugPath hM.toIsMatching P := isAugPath_of_singleEdge hl hx hy_not h.ne
        exact hM.encard.not_lt (hP.augment_encard.symm.trans_le (M ∆ P.edge).encard_le)
      simp [hx, this, Set.inter_singleton_iff]

exact series_of_forall_isBasis_inter_ne_empty (G.adj_v_mem_left h) (G.adj_v_mem_right h) (matchingMatroid.noColoop h✝ (G.adj_v_mem_left h)) (matchingMatroid.noColoop h✝ (G.adj_v_mem_right h)) (fun B hB ↦ hB.inter_adj_ne_empty h)

refine' Matroid.series_iff_forall_isBasis.2 ⟨matchingMatroid.noColoop h_ine hadj.left_mem,
    matchingMatroid.noColoop h_ine hadj.right_mem, fun B hB ↦ _⟩
  obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := hB
  by_contra' hB
  obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := hadj.exists_isLink
  let P := WList.cons x e (WList.nil y)
  have hP : G.IsAugPath hM P := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he hB.1 hB.2 hadj.ne
  exact (hP.augment_encard.symm.le.trans (hM.max _ hP.augment)).not_lt (M.encard.lt_add_one (by sorry))

have hx := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_ine h.mem_ground1
  have hy := matchingMatroid.noColoop h_ine h.mem_ground2
  refine G.matchingMatroid.series_of_not_mem_basis_forall hx hy (fun B hB ↦ ?_)
  obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := hB
  obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h
  by_contra! hB
  have hP := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he hB.1 hB.2 h.ne
  exact (hM.max _ hP.augment).not_lt (hP.augment_encard.symm ▸ ENat.lt_add_one hM.subset.encard_lt_top.ne)

obtain ⟨e, he⟩ := h
  apply G.matchingMatroid.series_of_cocircuit h.ne
  · refine ⟨{x, y}, ⟨by simp [he.left_mem, he.right_mem], fun B hB ↦ ?_⟩, by simp⟩
    · obtain ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩ := hB
      by_contra! hxy
      have hP := isAugPath_of_singleEdge he hxy.1 hxy.2 h.ne
      exact hM.max _ hP.augment |>.not_lt (by rw [hP.augment_encard]; exact ENat.lt_add_one hM.encard_lt_top)
    · rintro s (rfl | rfl) hsub <;> exact matchingMatroid.noColoop (by assumption) (by simpa) (G.matchingMatroid.isColoop_of_cocircuit_subset hsub (by simp))
